positive: A vibrant, highly stylized illustration featuring a whimsical group of stylized celestial animals (a glowing fox, a nebula deer, and a crescent moon owl) floating among geometric constellations and bioluminescent flora. The composition should be centered and symmetrical, suitable for a t-shirt print. Use a kawaii-meets-mystical aesthetic, rendered with thick, clean outlines, solid color blocking, and high contrast. Primary color palette: deep indigo, brilliant teal, warm gold, and soft lavender. The style should resemble detailed woodblock printing mixed with modern vector illustration, ensuring clean edges and minimal gradients. Aspect Ratio 1:1. Studio lighting, ultra-detailed, smooth vector art, digital ink wash.
negative: blurry, lowres, grainy, sketch, photorealistic, watermark, text, logo, signature, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, noise, jpeg artifacts, dirty, messy
